home.title: Online Typing Practice
home.subtitle: Improve your typing speed and accuracy
home.faq1A: HatHat supports Uyghur, Chinese Pinyin, Wubi input method, and English typing practice.
home.faq2Q: Do I need to create an account?
home.faq2A: No registration required. Open the page and start practicing immediately — all features are free.
home.faq3Q: How can I improve my typing speed?
home.faq3A: Start with word practice, then progress to sentences and articles. Daily practice is the most effective approach.
